description: White Fence is a predominantly Mexican American street gang based in Boyle Heights, East Los Angeles, claiming origins as early as 1900 but emerging in the 1910s as a sports team associated with La Purissima Church. It is one of the oldest gangs in Los Angeles, known for early use of firearms and a long-running rivalry with El Hoyo Maravilla. The gang has a structured barrio-based culture and is allied with the Mexican Mafia and Sureños.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: East and West Los Angeles , Hollywood , Las Vegas , El Paso , Florida , Mexico and Central America
country_links.context: The gang has territory in Mexico.
